overview.system_goal: Simulate Weibo-style multi-channel information diffusion: users receive blogs via algorithm feeds, social follow graph, search, and @/repost notifications; LLM agents decide reposts under memory/activity/freshness/interaction-threshold gates.
overview.environment_description: Shared flat content_pool of blogs (root posts and repost entries as top-level keys); mention_pool queues notifications per user; time advances in scheduled day slices with current_blogs windows.
overview.workflow_structure: Each step: EnvAgent StartEvent → UserAgent (exposure + self-memory) + Algorithm (sync blogs) → on-demand recommendation/search → repost & mention side-effects via AddRepostEvent → step advance.

design_concepts.interaction_patterns: Pull-based algorithm recommendations (GetAlgorithmRecomendationEvent), probabilistic social follow feed, mention delivery via mention_pool, optional search continuation, keep-following re-exposure.
design_concepts.communication_protocols: Reposts and mention_pool updates use AddRepostEvent / MentionPoolUpdateEvent RPC to SimEnv (async, not in workflow graph). RecommendationSpreadingEvent / MentionSpreadingEvent mark handler completion.
design_concepts.decision_mechanisms: UserAgentGates: memory similarity (step 1.5 coaching for low-activity users with memory), freshness, activity level, interaction threshold sampling; LLM JSON decisions for repost/@/search/keep-following.
design_concepts.execution_flow: StartEvent → get_exposure_stream ∥ generate_memory_from_own_blogs; StartEvent → Algorithm.update_current_blogs; exposure → {AlgorithmRecommendationEvent|SocialRecommendationEvent|KeepFollowingEvent|SearchResultEvent} → receive_recommendation; exposure → MentionEvent → handle_mention

details.agent_behaviors: UserAgent scans follow feed since last_login_timestamp, requests algorithm types from params_weibo_qwen25_14B.json, processes mention_pool with attention_budget cap, and runs receive_recommendation / handle_mention with chunked LLM calls. Algorithm agents run random/popularity/interest recommenders and relevant search.
details.decision_algorithms: Popularity: rolling-window popularity + repost_count distribution; Random: MAU-weighted sampling; Interest: embedding similarity + candidate_blog_ids_by_user; Search: embedding relevance to search_keyword.
details.specific_constraints: current_blogs = blogs with time < min(current_timestamp + timestamp_duration, simulation_cap); repost chains tracked via reposted_blog_id and reposted_path; simulation capped by max_span_days and max_step from params; stale_days default 3.0 for freshness gate.
details.process_sequence: 1) Load content_pool & profiles; 2) For each step broadcast StartEvent; 3) User exposure + memory; 4) Algorithm/on-demand feeds; 5) LLM repost decisions → content_pool & mention_pool; 6) Mention handling; 7) Advance timestamp, rebuild current_blogs, save channel snapshots & metrics.

agent_types.UserAgent: Weibo user with profile (nickname, interest_tags, activity_level, follow_ids/fan_ids), memory, recommended_blog_ids_by_channel, mentioned_blog_ids_by_channel, keep_following_blog_ids.
agent_types.Algorithm: Platform recommender/search agents: recomment_agent_0001 (random), recomment_agent_0002 (popularity), recomment_agent_0003 (interest), search_agent_0001 (relevant search).

metrics.name: Diffusion Generation Over Time
metrics.description: Total repost entry count in content_pool per monitor tick (reposted_blog_id non-empty); line chart over simulation steps.
metrics.calculation_logic: Count top-level content_pool entries where reposted_blog_id is non-empty (after strip). Does not traverse nested structures.

metrics.name: Diffusion Volume Real Time
metrics.description: By repost blog `time` (real time): cumulative repost count line + per-bin histogram; x-axis is UTC wall time, not simulation step.
metrics.calculation_logic: Only repost rows with valid `time`; _viz_kind repost_realtime; monitor draws twin-panel PNG.

metrics.name: Diffusion Hop Depth Over Time
metrics.description: Per tick: count repost entries in content_pool by hop depth (1=direct repost of root, 2=repost of repost, ...).
metrics.calculation_logic: Hop depth = len(reposted_path) non-empty nodes (min 1 for repost entries); series keys hop_1, hop_2, ...

metrics.name: User Repost Count Frequency
metrics.description: Distribution of repost entries per user (k=0,1,2,…); denominator = user_agent_profile_ids or pool authors.
metrics.calculation_logic: Histogram of per-user repost totals; raw_data._viz_kind user_repost_count_freq_bar.

metrics.name: Root Repost Count Frequency
metrics.description: Distribution of repost nodes under each root blog; denominator = all chain roots in content_pool.
metrics.calculation_logic: Histogram of per-root descendant counts; raw_data._viz_kind root_repost_count_freq_bar.

metrics.name: Root Author Self-Repost Behavior
metrics.description: Per root-tweet author: root_post_count, self_repost_hop_k on own chains, repost_on_others_count; exports CSV + snapshots.jsonl.
metrics.calculation_logic: Repost must be by same user_id as chain root author; hop depth via reposted_path length.

metrics.name: Text Similarity
metrics.description: Mean cosine similarity between generated repost embeddings and parent blog embeddings (BGE via embedding_client). Text uses // first segment after stripping @.
metrics.calculation_logic: Embed each generated repost text; compare to precomputed parent blog embedding from reference_embedding_path; return mean cosine or None if unavailable.

metrics.name: Text Diversity
metrics.description: Lexical/semantic diversity of generated repost texts: TTR, Distinct-2/3, 1-Self-BLEU, Div_sem. Repost content uses // first segment after stripping @; bare repost markers excluded.
metrics.calculation_logic: Pool reposted_blog_id non-empty entries; format_repost_text; compute diversity; embed via embedding_client; _viz_kind repost_diversity.

metrics.name: Text Max Reference Similarity
metrics.description: Reference-driven max cosine: each reference repost vs all simulated reposts under the same root blog_id, then mean over matched references.
metrics.calculation_logic: Load reference CSV by root blog_id; embed reference & generated reposts; mean of max cosine per reference row.
